Class SubscriberInformationController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.BaseDisplayController
Controllers.SubscriberInformationController
public class SubscriberInformationController extends BaseDisplayController
Controller for displaying information about subscribers. Handles initialization of the TableView, populating subscriber data, enabling history viewing, and navigation between scenes.

  • Constructor Details

    • SubscriberInformationController

      public SubscriberInformationController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller. Sets up TableView columns, fetches all users from the client, and configures the Show History button to be enabled only when a subscriber is selected.

    • showUsers

      public void showUsers(List<? extends User> users)
      Populates the TableView with a list of users.
      Parameters:
      users - the list of users to display

    • onPreviousPage

      private void onPreviousPage()
      Navigates back to the Supervisor UI.

    • onShowHistory

      private void onShowHistory()
      Handles showing the selected subscriber's history. Sets the selected user ID in SubscribersHistortOrdersController and navigates to the SubscribersHistoryOrdersUI scene.

    • showReservations

      public void showReservations(List list)
      Overrides the BaseDisplayController method to display reservations. Empty implementation because this controller does not display reservations.
      Specified by:
      showReservations in class BaseDisplayController
      Parameters:
      list - the list of reservations (ignored)
